ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the football team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league in which the team participates */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_foundation_date" TEXT /* Date when the team was founded */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the current team manager */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media_handles" TEXT /* JSON object containing social media handles (e.g., Twitter, Facebook, Instagram) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the football league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "league_foundation_date" TEXT /* Date when the league was founded */,
  "league_commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the current league commissioner */,
  "league_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "league_social_media_handles" TEXT /* JSON object containing social media handles (e.g., Twitter, Facebook, Instagram) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Stadium where the match was played */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the match (e.g., 2-1, 0-0) */,
  "match_referee" TEXT /* Name of the match referee */,
  "match_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "match_weather_conditions" TEXT /* Text describing the weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the match */,
  "match_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the match */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, postponed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference for the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total number of goals conceded by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of matches won by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of matches drawn by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of matches lost by the team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the standings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "player_birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "player_preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (e.g., right, left) */,
  "player_market_value" TEXT /* Current market value of the player */,
  "player_contract_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the player's contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player in the match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player in the match */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal by the player in the match */,
  "shots_off_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots off goal by the player in the match */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player in the match */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the player in the match */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player in the match */,
  "fouls_received" INTEGER /* Number of fouls received by the player in the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, player, fan) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user is associated with */,
  "user_birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "user_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the user */,
  "user_profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the platform */,
  "actions" TEXT /* Actions performed by the user (e.g., viewed reports, analyzed data) */,
  "user_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when they accessed the platform */,
  "user_device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the user (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user */,
  "user_os" TEXT /* Operating system used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
